---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect in the platform
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
---

## Summary

One line describing the bug.

## Affected area

- [ ] Core platform
- [ ] A specific module: `module-...`
- [ ] An app: (web / bff / gateway / ...)
- [ ] Infrastructure / deployment
- [ ] Documentation

## Deployment mode

- [ ] Cloud
- [ ] Self-hosted server
- [ ] Workstation
- [ ] Not deployment-dependent

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behavior

What should have happened.

## Actual behavior

What happened instead. Include error messages, logs, screenshots if relevant.

## Environment

- Platform version: (e.g. `v0.1.0`)
- Node version: (`node --version`)
- pnpm version: (`pnpm --version`)
- OS:
